intro: Over the past two weeks, ZCyberNews has tracked 22 articles covering Windows-related threats, with Kyber, Chaotic Eclipse, and VECT Ransomware among the most active actors. The coverage spans from April 12 to April 28, 2026, and includes two critical, sixteen high, and four medium severity incidents. Key vulnerabilities highlighted are CVE-2026-33104 (CVSS 7.8), CVE-2026-26179 (CVSS 7.5), CVE-2026-32183 (CVSS 7.5), CVE-2024-20662, and CVE-2024-21412. These actors and CVEs represent the primary focus of our reporting during this period.
